textByHashes.94e3be9023d70e0ca708fb094ca5afa0097fb0d7: Nobody knows the troubles I've seen...nobody knows my sorrow...
textByHashes.7eeaf30e8c18474f5affd9e1229a952c00998f67: I stuck my neck out for an old friend.
textByHashes.9612b2bd7bf793e5c385e271c16b692dbe248666: Well if I keep it all bottled up I'll turn into a total head case.
textByHashes.78c633ecaf5814efbef86f89a1048d31c41fedc0: Because I used to be able to do a handstand for over an hour while juggling cannon balls with my feet...
textByHashes.b4f045bcac217fb072c0ebf997eb0fd1cd4711a4: Yep. Now I can barely roll my eyes...
textByHashes.01a89f98998ddb6ec39ad4e951b66f08422b4974: No, but could you screw a handle into the top of my head?
textByHashes.6d58c902e2db939f913449bde7848598995d3fa6: Because currently you wave me about by my hair, and it hurts!
textByHashes.af09d6b361a4e86c33d6e69ec912ab5d04e264b6: Will you ever leave me alone?
textByHashes.d7944040887ff6ac519d9dbd1bbd289c51ae1cd7: If I try really hard I might be able to will myself deader...
